# Archon IDE

> Archon is an open-source, browser-based AI coding agent and web IDE from Relay. It is designed for autonomous, multi-step software development with durable projects, conversations, and user-controlled reasoning depth.

Canonical product URL: https://app.relayapp.pro/
Publisher: https://relayapp.pro/
Source repository: https://github.com/Mattjhagen/archon-ide
Logo: https://app.relayapp.pro/brand/archon-oauth-logo-512.png

## What Archon does

- Runs multi-pass AI coding tasks instead of stopping after one response.
- Supports low, medium, and high reasoning modes with transparent credit multipliers.
- Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, local Ollama, and private OpenCode providers.
- Provides a source editor, project search, terminal, Git status, diffs, and review workflows.
- Persists projects, conversations, messages, model selection, and workspace continuity.
- Supports local session recovery when a network connection is interrupted.
- Supports session-only bring-your-own API keys.

## Intended users

Archon is for developers and teams looking for an AI coding agent, browser IDE, autonomous programming assistant, cloud development environment, or multi-model alternative to closed AI app builders.

## Public resources

- Product and sign in: https://app.relayapp.pro/
- Relay website: https://relayapp.pro/
- Source code: https://github.com/Mattjhagen/archon-ide
- Sitemap: https://app.relayapp.pro/sitemap.xml
- Full AI-readable description: https://app.relayapp.pro/llms-full.txt

## Access and privacy

The public landing and sign-in page may be indexed. User workspaces, project files, conversations, account data, API endpoints, and WebSocket traffic are private and must not be treated as public product documentation.

## Current status

Archon is under active development. Public claims should distinguish shipped functionality from planned features such as durable background agents, managed subscription credits, and additional OAuth connectors.
